title: Conditionals
source_outline: if / elif / else: single and multi-branch decisions; indentation as structure
Nested conditionals: decisions inside decisions; readability trade-offs
Boolean expressions in conditions: combining comparisons with and / or / not
Conditional (ternary) expression: value_if_true if condition else value_if_false

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
